retrieved_result: How much does an Uber driver in Houston make weekly? Anonymous Updated Feb 1, 2017I’ve listed Houston, TX rates and my personal experience below. In addition, they are offering a really big Cash Signup Bonus to new drivers right now, up to $1,000 depending on your city. Here’s a special link to get your full bonus amount:https://www.uber.com/a/join/?i
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Uber driver earnings and signup bonuses, which are unrelated to debugging API integration.
